name: graphy
description: Knowledge-graph tooling for Claude Code: auto-builds a queryable graph of any workspace and exposes it via MCP tools, slash commands, a skill, and a subagent.

plugins.name: graphy
plugins.description: Build and query knowledge graphs of any codebase. Auto-runs when Claude reads source files; exposes MCP tools (search, neighbors, shortest-path) so Claude can query the graph instead of grepping.
